meaning: adj.象蒙古人的,蒙古人种的,[医]先头愚型的n.属于蒙古人种的人,[医]先头愚型患者
examples: Some people think they are the descendants of Mongoloid.
The genetic data supported Yao ethnic group was close to Mongoloid ethnic groups.
The ancient Xia are believed to be a non-Mongoloid western people from Iran, speculated to be the black Chinese .
